description_long: This is an above-ground, octagonal jacuzzi with a wooden exterior frame and a bright blue interior water basin. The jacuzzi features a set of wooden steps attached to one side, providing easy access to the water. On the opposite side, there is a visible orange and black filtration or pump unit, likely for water circulation and cleaning. The water inside appears clean and nearly full, with a smooth surface. Metal handrails are present at the entry point, enhancing safety for users entering or exiting the jacuzzi. The overall design is robust and suitable for outdoor urban environments such as backyards, parks, or communal spaces.
description: An octagonal, above-ground wooden jacuzzi with blue water, attached steps, and a visible filtration unit. Features metal handrails and a nearly full water level.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wooden steps and metal handrails leading into the jacuzzi.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the steps, handrails, and the orange filtration unit on the far side.
description_view_2: Rear angled view focusing on the filtration unit and the octagonal shape of the jacuzzi.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the filtration unit and the absence of steps on this side.
attribute_water_level: nearly full, water close to the top edge
